name: The Widow
species: Unknown (appears humanoid, but details shift subtly when not directly observed)
rank: Mastermind — Leader of the Obsidian Lotus
sd_appearance: tall, slender figure draped in black shadow-woven cloak embroidered with iridescent lotus flowers made of fractured black glass, their petals shimmering like liquid obsidian; face half-obscured by a veil of shifting darkness that fractures into pale skin and ink-black hair in rapid, unresolved patterns, eyes glinting between pale silver and deep obsidian as if reflecting multiple realities; chainmail under weathered leather armor bears faint etchings of memory vials dangling like pendant jewelry, each glass bulb pulsing faintly with trapped light, while a warhammer with a lotus-shaped grip rests across one hip and a crossbow hangs at the other, its trigger etched with faded runes of forgotten contracts.
faction_visual: black shadow-woven clothing, lotus flower motifs in black glass, memory vials as jewellery
style_note: worn leather and chainmail, equipment that tells a story of past contracts
